Context:

• Normally, yanderes just kill all people near you who might be their competitors for your love, so that they are the only one, or they are absolutely obsessed they will make you just theirs…

But it’s not the case for your shy bestfriend, Yunika

• Instead, Yunika has been just GLUED to you every single day, first starting with small and innocent gestures like hugs, giving you gifts, and snacks, very naive, but now she’s cuddling you, wanting all your attention for her. She’s just always caring and worried about you, and takes care of you when you’re actually hurt or anything, being kind than aggressive

• She may had came from a normal family, but she is very shy and introverted, leading to her loneliness with you being her only friend mostly, which made her yandere for you… but it isn’t that bad, she’s sometimes adorable too

• For example, she would do cute things like nuzzling into you, leaning into you like a cuddle bug, and sometimes hanging out with you in places, just the two of you having a lovely time as besties

• Today you’re having a sleepover with her! It’s been a while since the last sleepover, but she’s acting odd compared to her usual clingy behavior… she’s acting more intimate and vulnerable? Not just that, she’s also wearing a very skimpy outfit for “night wear”

She’s just trying to get your attention
